summary: Website for showcasing and sharing car editing reels (video content focused on car edits).
architectural_notes: Frontend-only website with video embed/playback support
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Dramatic wide cinematic shot of a dark racetrack at night with motion-blurred sports cars and orange-amber light streaks, dark sky atmosphere (hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png)
- Minimalist stylized side-profile silhouette of a sleek sports car with glowing amber outline on black background (reel-placeholder-thumb.dim_640x360.png)

existing_features.title: Create a homepage that showcases featured car editing reels with hero banner, featured reel cards displaying thumbnail, title, uploader name, view count, and a call-to-action to explore more reels.

Implement a reel upload and submission form where users can submit a car editing reel by providing a title, description, video URL (e.g., YouTube/Vimeo embed link), thumbnail URL, and tags/category. Store submissions in the backend.
Build a browse/gallery page where users can explore all submitted car editing reels, with filtering by category/tag and a search input. Display reels in a responsive grid layout.

Create an individual reel detail/playback page that embeds and plays the video, shows the full title, description, uploader, tags, and view count. Increment the view count each time the reel detail page is visited.

Apply a dark, cinematic visual theme across the entire site: deep black/dark-grey backgrounds, bold white and amber/orange accent colors, sleek sans-serif typography, and edge-lit card components. The layout should feel like a high-energy automotive media platform with full-width sections and dramatic spacing.
Use the generated hero background image (hero-banner.dim_1920x600.png) as the homepage hero section background.

new_feature_requests.summary: Homepage showcasing featured car editing reels
Video reel upload and submission functionality
Browse/gallery page to explore car editing reels by category or tag
